---
title: Logistic Regression of Hospitalization on Number of Medical Conditions
author: You
output: html_document
---

```{r, here-i-am, include = FALSE}
here::i_am(
  "subproject_ava/report.Rmd"
)
```

```{r, load-data, include = FALSE}
data <- readRDS(
  here::here("subproject_ava/output/recode.rds")
)
```

```{r, load-table_one, include = FALSE}
table_one <- readRDS(
 file = here::here("subproject_ava/output/table_one.rds"))
table_one %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  gt::tab_header(
    title = md("**Table 1. Logistic regression of patient hospitalization by number of medical conditions (odds ratios with 95% CI).**")
  )
